title: The Great War
content:
The Great War, later referred to as the 1st Hydian War, (2429-2444 CE) was a large scale conflict between most of the powers of the Hydian Sector, that spanned hundreds of light years of space. The opposing alliances of war were the Sector Alliance (United Equus, the United Systems Confederacy, the Sarden Clans, and the Preservers) and the alliance between the Apleen State and Huachavi Orthodoxy (commonly referred to as the Twin Powers). Named for it's - at the time unrivalled - scale, the lasting effects of the war defined the Hydian sector for the centuries that followed. It was largest conflict in the Hydian sector until after the fall of the Solar Empire , the war swept across the space and worlds of its belligerents for over 15 years; beginning on May 13th, 2429, with the [[1st Battle of Yildun Rest]].

The Conflict

Outcome

  • Apleen Ministry of Society ousted from power
  • Apleen Resistance reorganized into the Apleen Republic
  • Apleen Republic joins the Sector Alliance
  • Sarden Tribes and the Preservers rejoin the Sector Alliance
  • The Alliance Tribunal for Wartime Actions begins
  • Equestrian control over the Disputed Zone is formally recognized by all parties
  • Huachavi Frontier placed under direct Sector Alliance military occupation
